US: US1: As a coach who frequently messages clients, I want to save and quickly insert predefined responses in chats, so that I can respond faster and maintain consistency in my communication without typing the same messages repeatedly
AC: AC1: Add Saved Response button in Editor nav
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open conversation in Editor
3. Verify Editor nav
Title: button next to GIF button
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses button next to GIF button

Title: hover tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Saved Responses \"

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open conversation in Editor
3. Click Saved Responses button
4. Verify modal
Title: modal shown on click
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses modal

Step: 1. Verify empty state
Title: empty state message
Expectation: - SHOULD display empty state message: "Your saved responses list is empty. Start by creating your first one to save time during chats."

Step: 1. Verify modal layout
Title: modal layout with responses
Expectation:
- SHOULD display left-side list of saved response titles
- SHOULD display right-side message detail of selected response

Step:
1. Verify X button
2. Close modal via X button / Esc key
3. Verify modal closed
Title: X button display / close via X / Esc
Expectation:
- SHOULD display X button in top-right corner
- SHOULD close the modal

Step: 1. Verify Search box
Title: Search box in modal
Expectation: - SHOULD display Search box

Step: 1. Verify Create new button
Title: Create new button
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Create new" button in top-right corner

Title: hover Create new tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Create New" on hover

Step: 1. Verify FREQUENTLY USED section
Title: FREQUENTLY USED section displayed
Expectation: - SHOULD display FREQUENTLY USED section when frequently used responses exist

Title: FREQUENTLY USED section hidden
Expectation: - SHOULD hide FREQUENTLY USED section when no frequently used responses exist

Step: 1. Verify FREQUENTLY USED items
Title: top 5 most-used responses
Expectation: - SHOULD display top 5 most-used saved responses by usage_count descending

Title: fewer than 5 responses
Expectation: - SHOULD display all available responses when fewer than 5

Title: equal usage_count sort
Expectation: - SHOULD sort by title ascending (A-Z) when usage_count is equal

Step: 1. Verify ALL section
Title: ALL section with responses
Expectation: - SHOULD display ALL section with all saved responses sorted by title A-Z

Step: 1. Verify first item selection
Title: first item auto-selected
Expectation: - SHOULD select the first saved response in the list by default

Step:
1. Select a saved response
2. Press arrow keys (Up, Down)
3. Verify navigation
Title: arrow key navigation
Expectation: - SHOULD allow navigation between responses using arrow keys

Step:
1. Select a saved response
2. Verify right-side detail
Title: message detail display
Expectation: - SHOULD display title and message_detail on right-side

Step:
1. Hover over message detail
2. Verify 3-dot button
Title: 3-dot button on hover
Expectation: - SHOULD show 3-dot button when hovering over message detail

Step:
1. Select response with long message
2. Verify scrolling
Title: scroll long message
Expectation: - SHOULD allow scrolling if the message is long

Step:
1. Hover over different response titles
2. Verify detail update
Title: hover preview message
Expectation: - SHOULD display message detail when hovering over title

Step: 1. Verify initial load
Title: pagination initial load
Expectation: - SHOULD load first 20 items

Step:
1. Scroll down
2. Verify Load more
Title: pagination Load more
Expectation:
- SHOULD display Load more button when scrolled down
- SHOULD load next 20 items when Load more clicked

Step: 1. Verify footer shortcuts
Title: footer shortcut display
Expectation: - SHOULD display list of shortcuts in footer

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses modal
3. Verify Search box default state
Title: Search box placeholder default
Expectation: - SHOULD display placeholder "Search saved response" by default

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Focus on Search box
3. Verify placeholder
Title: Search box placeholder on focus
Expectation: - SHOULD change placeholder to "Enter keyword..." when focused

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Input text in Search box
3. Verify x icon
Title: x icon shown on input
Expectation: - SHOULD display x icon when inputting text

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Input text in Search box
3. Press backspace
4. Verify text removal
Title: clear via backspace
Expectation: - SHOULD remove text when backspace pressed

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Input text in Search box
3. Click x icon
4. Verify search cleared
Title: clear via x icon
Expectation: - SHOULD remove text and show full list when x icon clicked

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Input 1 character in Search box
3. Verify search starts
Title: search starts from 1 char
Expectation: - SHOULD start searching from 1 character

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Input keyword matching title or message
3. Verify search results
Title: search by title and message
Expectation: - SHOULD return all saved responses where title or message contains the search keyword

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Input keyword with mixed case
3. Verify search results
Title: case-insensitive search
Expectation: - SHOULD return results case-insensitively

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Input partial keyword
3. Verify search results
Title: partial match search
Expectation: - SHOULD return results when keyword appears anywhere within title or message field

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Input keyword with no matches
3. Verify no results display
Title: no results found
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Search results (0)" when no matches found

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Input keyword with matches
3. Verify results count
Title: matching results count
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Search results ({number_of_matched_results})" below Search box

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Input keyword with matches
3. Verify first result selection
Title: first search result auto-selected
Expectation: - SHOULD select the first result by default

Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Input keyword with 21+ matches
3. Verify pagination
Title: search results pagination
Expectation:
- SHOULD load first 20 items
- SHOULD display Load more button when scrolled down and load next 20 items

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses modal
3. Click 3-dot button on a saved response
4. Verify submenu
Title: 3-dot submenu shown
Expectation: - SHOULD display submenu with Edit response and Delete response options

AC: AC5: Add a new saved response
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses modal
3. Click Create new button
4. Verify popup
Title: Create Saved Response popup
Expectation: - SHOULD display Create Saved Response popup

Step:
1. Open Create Saved Response popup
2. Verify popup title
Title: popup title
Expectation: - SHOULD display title "Create Saved Response"

Step:
1. Verify X button and Cancel button
2. Close popup via X / Cancel
3. Verify popup closed
Title: X button / Cancel closes popup
Expectation:
- SHOULD display X button
- SHOULD close the popup

Step:
1. Open Create Saved Response popup
2. Verify TITLE field
Title: TITLE field displayed
Expectation: - SHOULD display TITLE field with icon and required indicator

Step:
1. Open Create Saved Response popup
2. Hover over TITLE field icon
3. Verify tooltip
Title: TITLE field tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Used to organize responses. This won't appear in messages.."

Step:
1. Open Create Saved Response popup
2. Verify TITLE field default state
Title: TITLE field placeholder
Expectation: - SHOULD display placeholder "Name this response for easy search"

Step:
1. Open Create Saved Response popup
2. Input text in TITLE field
3. Verify input allowed
Title: TITLE field allows all characters
Expectation: - SHOULD allow all characters

Step:
1. Input 140 characters in TITLE field / Paste text >140 characters
2. Verify max limit
Title: TITLE field max 140 chars
Expectation:
- SHOULD prevent input after 140 characters
- SHOULD cut off and paste only the first 140 characters

Step:
1. Open Create Saved Response popup
2. Verify MESSAGE field
Title: MESSAGE field displayed
Expectation: - SHOULD display MESSAGE field with required indicator

Step:
1. Open Create Saved Response popup
2. Verify MESSAGE field default state
Title: MESSAGE field placeholder
Expectation: - SHOULD display placeholder "Write the full message you want to send to clilents"

Step:
1. Open Create Saved Response popup
2. Input text in MESSAGE field
3. Verify input allowed
Title: MESSAGE field allows characters
Expectation: - SHOULD allow any characters without text-formatting

Step:
1. Open Create Saved Response popup
2. Paste formatted text in MESSAGE field
3. Verify formatting cleared
Title: MESSAGE field clears formatting
Expectation: - SHOULD clear text-formatting when pasting formatted text

Step:
1. Open Create Saved Response popup
2. Input text in MESSAGE field
3. Verify character count
Title: MESSAGE field character count
Expectation: - SHOULD display character count as "{X}/10000"

Step:
1. Input 10,000 characters in MESSAGE field / Paste text >10,000 characters
2. Verify max limit
Title: MESSAGE field max 10,000 chars
Expectation:
- SHOULD prevent input after 10,000 characters
- SHOULD cut off and paste only the first 10,000 characters

Step:
1. Open Create Saved Response popup
2. Verify Cancel button state
Title: Cancel button always enabled
Expectation: - SHOULD display Cancel button as always enabled

Step:
1. Open Create Saved Response popup
2. Verify Save button state
Title: Save button disabled by default
Expectation: - SHOULD display Save button as disabled by default

Step:
1. Open Create Saved Response popup
2. Input text in both TITLE and MESSAGE fields
3. Verify Save button
Title: Save button enabled with input
Expectation: - SHOULD enable Save button when both TITLE and MESSAGE fields have input

Step:
1. Open Create Saved Response popup
2. Input text in both fields
3. Click Save button
4. Verify saved response added
Title: Save adds new response
Expectation:
- SHOULD add a new saved response to the list
- SHOULD display toast "New Saved Response created."

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses modal
3. Click 3-dot button on a saved response
4. Click Edit response option
5. Verify popup
Title: Edit Saved Response popup
Expectation: - SHOULD display Edit Saved Response popup

Step:
1. Open Edit Saved Response popup
2. Verify popup title
Title: popup title
Expectation: - SHOULD display title "Edit Saved Response"

Step:
1. Open Edit Saved Response popup
2. Verify TITLE field
Title: TITLE field pre-populated
Expectation: - SHOULD pre-populate TITLE field with existing shortcut value

Step:
1. Open Edit Saved Response popup
2. Click X button with no changes
3. Verify popup closed
Title: close with no changes
Expectation: - SHOULD close the popup when no changes made

Step:
1. Open Edit Saved Response popup
2. Make at least 1 change
3. Click X button
4. Verify Discard Changes popup
Title: Discard Changes popup shown
Expectation: - SHOULD display Discard Changes popup with title "Discard Changes?" and text "Are you sure you want to go? Changes have not been saved yet."

Step:
1. Open Edit Saved Response popup
2. Make changes
3. Click X button
4. In Discard Changes popup, click Cancel or X icon
5. Verify popup closed
Title: Discard Changes Cancel
Expectation: - SHOULD close Discard Changes popup and return to Edit popup

Step:
1. Open Edit Saved Response popup
2. Make changes
3. Click X button
4. In Discard Changes popup, click Discard Changes button
5. Verify result
Title: Discard Changes confirms
Expectation: - SHOULD close Discard Changes popup and Edit popup without saving changes

Step:
1. Open Edit Saved Response popup
2. Make changes to TITLE or MESSAGE field
3. Click Save button
4. Verify saved response updated
Title: Save updates response
Expectation:
- SHOULD update the saved response
- SHOULD display toast "Saved Response updated successfully."

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses modal
3. Click 3-dot button on a saved response
4. Click Delete response option
5. Verify confirmation popup
Title: Delete confirmation popup
Expectation: - SHOULD display confirmation popup with title "Delete Response?" and text "This response will be permanently deleted and can't be recovered. Are you sure you want to proceed?"

Step:
1. Open Delete confirmation popup
2. Click Cancel button
3. Verify popup closed
Title: Cancel deletion
Expectation: - SHOULD close the popup without deleting

Step:
1. Open Delete confirmation popup
2. Click OK button
3. Verify saved response deleted
Title: Confirm deletion
Expectation:
- SHOULD close the popup
- SHOULD delete the response
- SHOULD display toast "Saved Response deleted."

AC: AC8: Add saved response to chat box by selecting an item in Saved Response popup
Step:
1. Open Saved Responses modal
2. Select a saved response
3. Click title / Press ENTER key
4. Verify chatbox
Title: insert via click / ENTER
Expectation: - SHOULD append the full message content into the chatbox behind current text

US: US2: As a coach who frequently messages clients, I want to create a saved response from a message in the conversation, so that I add a new saved response quicker
AC: AC1: Add "Save this response" button to Coach's non-text message
Step:
1. Login as Coach on paid plan (Pro, Studio)
2. Open conversation
3. Hover over Coach's non-text message
4. Verify button
Title: Save this response button
Expectation: - SHOULD display button between 3-dot and Reply buttons

Title: button tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Saved this response" on hover

Step:
1. Login as Coach on Free plan
2. Open conversation
3. Hover over Coach's non-text message
4. Verify button not shown
Title: button hidden on Free plan
Expectation: - SHOULD NOT display button when workspace is on Free plan

AC: AC2: Add new saved response from the conversation
Step:
1. Login as Coach on paid plan
2. Open conversation
3. Hover over Coach's non-text message
4. Click Save this response button
5. Verify popup
Title: Add To Saved Responses popup
Expectation: - SHOULD display popup with title "Add To Saved Responses"

Step:
1. Hover over Coach's message
2. Click Save this response button
3. Verify TITLE field
Title: TITLE field blank
Expectation: - SHOULD leave TITLE field blank

Step:
1. Hover over Coach's message
2. Click Save this response button
3. Verify MESSAGE field
Title: MESSAGE field pre-populated
Expectation: - SHOULD pre-populate MESSAGE field with Coach's message content

Step:
1. Hover over Coach's message with >10,000 characters
2. Click Save this response button
3. Verify MESSAGE field
Title: MESSAGE field truncated
Expectation: - SHOULD pre-populate MESSAGE field with first 10,000 characters when message exceeds limit

Step:
1. Click Save this response button
2. Input TITLE
3. Click Save button
4. Verify saved response added
Title: Save adds response from conversation
Expectation:
- SHOULD add message as a new saved response
- SHOULD display toast "Response has been saved"
